title: Belfast, Northern Ireland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Belfast, Northern Ireland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Belfast is a city in Northern Ireland with a population of 345,418. Northern Ireland’s capital with a transformed city center, thriving film industry, and the UK’s lowest cost of living.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
